Skip to contents
reactablePlus 0.1.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Articles

Package index

Setup

Load widget dependencies and wire picker bindings inside reactable.

useReactablePlus() useSchoolHistory()
Include all reactablePlus widget dependencies
popoverDep()
Popover core dependency (shared JS + CSS)
bindPickersOnRender()
Bind picker inputs after a reactable renders

Picker Widgets

Input constructors and update functions for inline cell editors. Each widget has a Shiny input binding, so its value is available via input$<id> on the server side.

schoolPickerInput()
School picker input
updateSchoolPickerInput()
Update a school picker from the server
useSchoolSearch()
Wire up server-side school search
attendancePickerInput()
Attendance picker input
updateAttendancePickerInput()
Update an attendance picker from the server
homeschoolPickerInput()
Homeschool picker input
updateHomeschoolPickerInput()
Update a homeschool picker from the server
notesInput()
Notes text input
updateNotesInput()
Update a notes input from the server
gearPopoverInput()
Gear popover settings input
updateGearPopoverInput()
Update a gear popover from the server

Config-Driven Table Module

A higher-level Shiny module that renders an editable table from a declarative table_config object. Handles widget dispatch, mutual exclusion, fill-down, gear toggles, and data marshaling.

config_table_ui()
Config-driven Editable Table UI
config_table_server()
Config-driven Editable Table Server
table_config()
Build a table configuration
widget_col()
Build a widget column specification

Raw-Spec Table Module

A lower-level Shiny module driven by row_spec and col_spec lists. Supports dropdowns, numeric inputs, checkboxes, toggles, date pickers, and text fields with gating, selection, and reset.

editable_table_ui()
UI function for the editable table Shiny module
editable_table_server()
Server function for the editable table Shiny module
validate_col_spec()
Validate a col_spec list
validate_row_spec()
Validate a row_spec list
validate_row_inputs()
Validate user-supplied input values against col_spec rules
collect_inputs()
Collect inline Shiny input values into a tidy tibble
merge_existing_data()
Merge previously saved values onto the display data frame
make_input_id()
Generate a stable, unique input element ID

Grade Utilities

Helper functions for working with grade-level keys (PK through 12). Used by the config-driven module’s fill-down logic.

gradeChoices() gradeLabelMap()
Grade choices and labels
gradeIndex()
Grade ordering index
gradeInRange()
Check if a grade falls within a school's grade range

On this page
